title: Only Excavators - Recipe Balancing
description: This Datapack Balances out most recipes from the Only Excavators mod.
body:
This Datapack Balances out most recipes from the Only Excavators mod. Most items will be exchanged by their Respective Block counterparts, earlier ones such as Iron Excavators also need Diamonds, Copper or other smaller items. Everything is Vanilla + OnlyExcavators compatible. No Modded items have been used for the recipe so its safe to add to any modpack where you think that the Excavators are just, well, too cheap. I wont judge

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/only-excavators is the Mod the Excavators are from. If you do not download the linked mod, this datapack will do nothing.
